description_long: This is a bronze sculpture of a standing male figure dressed in formal 19th-century attire, including a long coat, waistcoat, and trousers. The figure has a full beard and mustache, and his right hand is tucked into his coat, while his left arm hangs by his side. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular plinth, giving it a dignified and authoritative presence. The surface of the sculpture is smooth with subtle textural details that highlight the folds of the clothing and the facial features. The overall finish is dark and metallic, typical of patinated bronze statues often found in public spaces.
description: A bronze statue of a bearded man in formal 19th-century attire, standing with one hand tucked into his coat, mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, detailed beard, and right hand tucked into his coat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm position, and the draping of the coat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, coat, and the rectangular base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile and the relaxed left arm by the side.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture is isolated on a plain background.
